kobeBlue:ExplosiveStrike.NAME: Explosive Strike
kobeBlue:ExplosiveStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Evoke ALL Lightning.

kobeBlue:Hack.NAME: Hack
kobeBlue:Hack.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Gain 1 Orb slot.

kobeBlue:Multiplexer.NAME: Multiplexer
kobeBlue:Multiplexer.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage !M! times. NL Dexterity and Focus affect the damage of this card.

kobeBlue:ScannerBeam.NAME: Scanner Beam
kobeBlue:ScannerBeam.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage and apply 1 Lock-On to ALL enemies.

kobeBlue:Arc.NAME: Arc
kobeBlue:Arc.DESCRIPTION: Channel up to !M! Lightning to fill your empty Orb slots.

kobeBlue:CloakingShadows.NAME: Cloaking Shadows
kobeBlue:CloakingShadows.DESCRIPTION: Channel 1 Dark. NL Gain Block equal to !M! times the number of Dark you have.
kobeBlue:CloakingShadows.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Channel 1 Dark. NL Gain Block equal to !M! times the number of Dark you have +!kobeBlue:SecondMagic!.

kobeBlue:Debug.NAME: Debug
kobeBlue:Debug.DESCRIPTION: Scry !M!. NL Exhaust 1 Curse or 1 Status in your discard pile at random.

kobeBlue:Hibernate.NAME: Hibernate
kobeBlue:Hibernate.DESCRIPTION: Channel !kobeBlue:SecondMagic! Frost. NL Next turn, remove !M! rightmost Frost.

kobeBlue:Integrate.NAME: Integrate
kobeBlue:Integrate.DESCRIPTION: Convert each empty Orb slot into !M! NL *Plated *Armor. NL Exhaust.

kobeBlue:Nova.NAME: Nova
kobeBlue:Nova.DESCRIPTION: Evoke up to 3 Orbs. NL If 3 unique Orbs are Evoked this way, Channel 1 Plasma.

kobeBlue:Polymorphism.NAME: Polymorphism
kobeBlue:Polymorphism.DESCRIPTION: Choose 1 of !M! non-Blue Powers to add into your hand. NL Exhaust.

kobeBlue:Unity.NAME: Unity
kobeBlue:Unity.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL If all your Orbs are of the same type, draw !M! cards.

kobeBlue:Automation.NAME: Automation
kobeBlue:Automation.DESCRIPTION: Whenever an Orb is Channeled into an empty slot, trigger its passive twice.
kobeBlue:Automation.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Whenever an Orb is Channeled into an empty slot, trigger its passive !M! times.

kobeBlue:HeavyDuty.NAME: Heavy-Duty
kobeBlue:HeavyDuty.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you gain a debuff, gain !M! Artifact.

kobeBlue:TrialAndError.NAME: Trial and Error
kobeBlue:TrialAndError.DESCRIPTION: The first time you shuffle your draw pile each turn, gain !M! Strength and !M! Dexterity.
kobeBlue:TrialAndError.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. The first time you shuffle your draw pile each turn, gain !M! Strength and !M! Dexterity.
